SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.WarnOnOffSide.H: Show a warning when a MidiQOL workflow starts for a combatant that is not on the currently active side. For MidiQOL reactions, set Record AOO to Do not check.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.GroupByDisposit: Use token ownership and disposition to suggest an initial side assignment.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.ShowTrackerCont: Add Side Initiative controls to the combat tracker header.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Notifications.OffSide: {name} is acting outside the active side ({side}). Warning only; the workflow continues.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Notifications.NoCombatan: Could not determine the combatant for this MidiQOL workflow.
